nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: Baldric
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Baldry
meanings: English (Suffolk and Norfolk): from the Middle English personal names Baldri(c) and Baldrich. The first is usually from ancient Germanic Baldric, which was common in the French forms Baldri and Baudri. The second represents the cognate Old English name Bealdrīc, formed from beald ‘bold, brave’ + rīc ‘ruler’, which is attested in Middle English forms such as Belrich, Balrich, Baltriht, and Baldrich.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: Baldric de Lascelles was born in 1015, in Falaise, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France as the son of Bernard Biklung. He had at least 1 son. He died about 1070, in Skipwith, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Skipwith, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

ja.Skipwith, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングスキプウィス
ja.Lascelles, Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Norm: フランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスファレイゼ
ja.lifeSummary: Baldric de Lascellesは1015年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスファレイゼでBernard Biklungの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1070年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプウィスで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングスキプウィスにて埋葬された。

ko.Skipwith, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 스키p위스
ko.lifeSummary: Baldric de Lascelles(은)는 1015년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 팔레이스에서 Bernard Biklung의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1070년 영국 요르크실르 스키p위스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 스키p위스에 묻혔다.
